name: image_analyze
description: Analyze an image using a vision model. Accepts a local file path or a public URL. Returns a text description or answer to your question about the image. Use for screenshots, diagrams, photos, charts, or any visual content you need to understand.

source.description: Local file path (absolute or ~ relative) or public HTTPS URL to the image

prompt.description: What to ask about the image (default: 'Describe this image in detail')
